deviations.description: The new requirement introduces an obligation for the phone company to ask for consent from the data subject before retrieving any kind of personal data. The process model on page 1 shows that the phone company requests personal data from the customer before asking for consent, as the 'Ask for consent' activity occurs after 'Request personal data'. This directly violates the new 'A_precedes_B' obligation.
process_model_reference: Request personal data, Ask for consent
